title: README and AGENTS staged reconcile and report deterministic boundary docs
problem: Pre-ticket audits 221/222 confirmed reconcile-scores and generate-run-report are deterministic with no live LLM path, but README/AGENTS still frame RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_STAGED_RECONCILE/REPORT primarily as spine gates without explicit no-LLM boundary.
acceptance_criteria: README and AGENTS document that reconcile-scores and generate-run-report are deterministic Python (no live LLM fallthrough).
Docs distinguish network spine gates from per-step live Ollama gates.
Staged rank-1 LLM inventory (extract/link/build/detect only) referenced.
non_goals: New LLM tasks or fallthrough flags.
category: Phase 3 / live LLM / staged spine documentation
